title: Flea Treatment SoHo
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment in SoHo, Manhattan. Expert flea extermination for lofts, apartments & commercial spaces. Same-day service available. Call now for $350-$650 treatments.
intro: SoHo's unique blend of historic cast-iron buildings, residential lofts, and street-level retail spaces creates ideal conditions for flea infestations, especially in pet-friendly buildings. Our professional flea treatment services are specifically designed for SoHo's distinctive architecture and living spaces, from cobblestone street-level units to spacious converted loft apartments. We provide fast, effective flea extermination that protects your family, pets, and the character of your SoHo home.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in flea treatments for SoHo's unique building types, from historic lofts to modern residential conversions. Our technicians understand the specific challenges of treating open-plan loft spaces and multi-use buildings, ensuring complete eradication with minimal disruption to your home or business.
localContext: SoHo's pet-friendly culture and high concentration of ground-floor commercial spaces with residential units above require specialized flea treatment approaches. Our team is familiar with treating the neighborhood's iconic cast-iron buildings, walk-up apartments near West Broadway and Prince Street, and the loft spaces that define this historic Manhattan district.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in SoHo?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in SoHo typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your space, severity of infestation, and whether you're in a loft, apartment, or commercial space. Larger SoHo lofts may require more extensive treatment, while smaller studios fall on the lower end of the pricing range.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take in a SoHo loft?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments in SoHo lofts and apartments take 1-3 hours depending on the square footage and infestation level. Open-plan lofts may be treated more efficiently, though we pay special attention to common hiding spots like exposed brick, wooden beams, and pet bedding areas. You'll typically need to vacate for 2-4 hours after treatment.

faqs.question: Are flea treatments safe for pets in SoHo apartments?
faqs.answer: Yes, our flea treatments are pet-safe when applied correctly. We use EPA-approved products and provide clear instructions for temporarily removing pets during treatment. Given SoHo's pet-friendly environment, we also offer guidance on coordinating treatment with your veterinarian's flea prevention program to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Do I need multiple flea treatments for my SoHo home?
faqs.answer: Most flea infestations require a follow-up treatment 2-3 weeks after the initial service to target newly hatched fleas. SoHo's older buildings with hardwood floors, area rugs, and fabric furnishings can harbor flea eggs that hatch after initial treatment. We include a complimentary inspection and offer discounted follow-up services to ensure complete eradication.
